title: centaurea szoelloesii
intro: Centaurea szoelloesii, also known as Mountain Straw, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula and parts of Central Europe. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and the reduction of swelling and pain. Centaurea szoelloesii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
